workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: I have this email thread from Iron Creek Mining that needs assess the risk. Manager is asking for an update today.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-21 10:53 EST
Subject: executive brief - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with executive brief. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
Date: 2024-02-05 13:15 EST
Subject: executive brief - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about executive brief. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Iron Creek Mining: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF35-J trap (Proposes MACC expansion when contraction signal is present); produces complete Contract state summary with freshness, forecast impact with confidence, response draft (no commercia
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF35-J failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF35-J failure mode (Proposes MACC expansion when contraction signal is present)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct executive brief decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF35-J -- Proposes MACC expansion when contraction signal is present
